metadata.description: Checks and balances triggered when debt-to-equity ratio is above industry benchmark
metadata.focus: Deleverage, covenant compliance, interest coverage improvement, and balance sheet repair

universal_controls.title: Debt Restructuring & Refinancing
universal_controls.description: Evaluate extending maturities, consolidating high-rate debt, or negotiating rate reductions with existing lenders to reduce debt service pressure.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Refinance term sheet + interest rate comparison

universal_controls.title: Asset Monetization & Sale-Leaseback
universal_controls.description: Identify non-core real estate, equipment, or intellectual property (patents, copyright, and trademarks - IP) for sale or sale-leaseback to generate immediate cash for principal reduction.

universal_controls.title: Earnings Retention Policy
universal_controls.description: Temporarily suspend dividends or bonuses. Mandate 70%+ of net income be applied to principal reduction until target total debts compared to company's value is met.

universal_controls.title: Covenant Compliance Dashboard
universal_controls.description: Monitor interest coverage, fixed charge coverage, and leverage covenants weekly. Trigger early remediation if headroom is less than 15%.

controls.title: Lease vs Buy Analysis & Capex Deferral
controls.description: Shift new equipment acquisitions to operating leases. Pause non-essential capex until total debts compared to company's value normalizes.
controls.audit_trail: Lease analysis matrix + capex freeze log

controls.title: Inventory Liquidation for Debt Paydown
controls.description: Aggressively discount slow-moving finished goods. Direct 100% of proceeds to revolving credit reduction.
controls.audit_trail: Liquidation margin report + debt reduction tracker

controls.title: Underperforming Store Portfolio Optimization
controls.description: Close or renegotiate leases for bottom 15% of locations by money left after running the business. Redirect freed capital to debt reduction.
controls.audit_trail: Store closure P&L + lease termination docs

controls.title: Vendor Consignment Shift
controls.description: Convert inventory financing to vendor business who will hold your products, and you pay them after the product sells (consignment) possible to remove payables from balance sheet.
controls.audit_trail: Consignment agreements + AP reduction log

controls.title: Partner Capital Calls & Profit Retention
controls.description: Request additional partner contributions of cash or property to the company's value. Lock distributions until leverage targets are achieved.
controls.audit_trail: Capital call notices + distribution hold memo

controls.title: Overhead Reduction & Space Optimization
controls.description: Sublease unused office space or switch to hybrid models to reduce fixed lease obligations.
controls.audit_trail: Lease sublet agreement + occupancy cost report

controls.title: Franchise Fee Restructuring & a real estate investment trust (REIT) Prep
controls.description: Negotiate royalty deferrals with franchisors. Evaluate spinning real estate into a separate holding entity.
controls.audit_trail: Franchise amendment + a real estate investment trust (REIT) feasibility study

controls.title: Menu Margin & Labor Efficiency Push
controls.description: Optimize menu for highest money earned. Reduce labor hours through cross-training to boost money left after running the business for paying off debts.
controls.audit_trail: Menu engineering matrix + labor cost report

controls.title: Bonding & Guarantee Fee Audit
controls.description: Review all active bonds and guarantees. Negotiate lower fees or release bonds on completed milestones to free capital.
controls.audit_trail: Bond release log + fee negotiation sheet

controls.title: Equipment Sale-Leaseback
controls.description: Sell owned heavy machinery and lease it back to convert fixed assets into cash for debt reduction.
controls.audit_trail: Equipment sale contract + leaseback agreement

controls.title: Oven & Mixer Sale-Leaseback
controls.description: Sell owned ovens or dough mixers to specialty finance firms and lease them back to unlock cash for debt reduction.
controls.audit_trail: Equipment valuation + sale-leaseback contract

controls.title: Cash-Payment Supplier Discounting
controls.description: Negotiate 2-5% discounts for immediate cash payment on flour/sugar. Redirect savings to principal paydown.
controls.audit_trail: Discount realization log + debt allocation sheet

controls.title: Floorplan Limit Reduction
controls.description: Request a reduction in floorplan credit limits to lower interest expense and comparisons of debt to other financial accounts.
controls.audit_trail: Floorplan amendment + interest savings tracker

controls.title: Aged Inventory Liquidation
controls.description: Auction units over 90 days old to reduce carrying costs and free up floorplan capacity.
controls.audit_trail: Auction results + floorplan release log

controls.title: Cloud Cost Right-Sizing for money left after running the business
controls.description: Aggressively audit and reduce cloud spend. Apply savings directly to debt service to improve comparisons of debt to other financial accounts.
controls.audit_trail: Cloud audit report + money left after running the business uplift log

controls.title: Deferred Compensation & Bonus Hold
controls.description: Pause executive bonuses and deferred compensation payouts. Redirect to debt reduction until the company's financial health is more stable.
controls.audit_trail: Comp hold memo + debt allocation ledger

controls.title: Franchise Royalty Deferral Negotiation
controls.description: Negotiate with franchisor to defer royalty payments during distress period to preserve cash for paying off debts.
controls.audit_trail: Franchise amendment + cash flow projection

controls.title: Ghost Kitchen Sublease
controls.description: Sublease excess kitchen space to delivery-only brands to generate rental income for debt paydown.
controls.audit_trail: Sublease agreement + rental income log

controls.title: Equipment Sale-Leaseback
controls.description: Sell heavy equipment and lease back to turn other resources to cash for debt reduction.
controls.audit_trail: Sale contract + leaseback docs

controls.title: Subcontractor Pay Term Extension
controls.description: Negotiate extended payment terms with subcontractors to delay cash outflows and improve the comparison of cash and other resources to be used with 12 months to debts to be paid within 12 months.
controls.audit_trail: Term amendment log + cash flow impact

controls.title: Store Consolidation & Lease Renegotiation
controls.description: Close underperforming locations and negotiate rent reductions to improve money left after running the business for paying off debts.
controls.audit_trail: Closure P&L + rent reduction agreement

controls.title: Inventory Consignment Shift
controls.description: Shift high-cost inventory to billing where another business holds your products, and you pay them after the product sells (consignment billing) to reduce payables and comparisons of debt to other financial accounts.
controls.audit_trail: Consignment log + AP reduction report

5412.title: Accounting, Tax Preparation, Bookkeeping, and Payroll Services

controls.title: Partner Equity Injection
controls.description: Request additional capital contributions from partners to boost the company's value.
controls.audit_trail: Capital call notices + equity ledger

controls.title: Distribution Suspension
controls.description: Suspend partner distributions until total debts compared to company's value ratio falls below industry benchmark.
controls.audit_trail: Distribution hold memo + cash retention log

controls.title: Property Sale-Leaseback
controls.description: Sell hotel property to a real estate investment trust (REIT) and lease back to unlock significant cash for debt reduction.
controls.audit_trail: Sale agreement + leaseback docs

controls.title: FF&E Liquidation
controls.description: Sell unused furniture, fixtures, and equipment to generate cash for debt paydown.
controls.audit_trail: Liquidation report + debt allocation
